positive: A stylized, minimalist illustration featuring a group of interconnected celestial bodies (stars, moons, comets) forming a glowing constellation pattern. The aesthetic is vaporwave-meets-artdeco, using clean lines, bold outlines, and flat color areas against a dark, deep indigo background. The central composition should show a prominent, crescent moon embraced by stylized, geometric stars and nebula swirls in vibrant pastel purples, electric blues, and soft turquoise. Focus on high contrast and clean silhouettes suitable for a repeating fabric pattern. Cinematic lighting, ultra-detailed, vector art, print-on-demand style.
negative: photorealistic, blur, noisy, low quality, watermark, text, signature, artifacts, extra limbs, bad anatomy, sketch, grain
